name: Advance America
description_short: Advance America at 2602 E Fletcher Ave, Tampa, FL offers fast payday and title loans with same-day decisions.
description_long:
Advance America's Tampa location sits at 2602 E Fletcher Ave, Unit 109, providing quick access to payday and title loan services in the E. Fletcher area. This standalone storefront operates Monday through Thursday from 10 AM to 6 PM, Friday 9 AM to 6 PM, and Saturday 9 AM to 4 PM, staying closed on Sundays. The convenient E. Fletcher address makes it easy for Tampa residents to stop by during weekday lunch hours or weekend mornings.

At this Tampa location, you can apply for payday loans, title loans, and other short-term lending options designed for immediate cash needs. The team at this E. Fletcher Avenue storefront can walk you through the application process and answer questions about terms specific to Florida lending regulations. Call +1 813-631-8289 to discuss your options or get more information about what documents you'll need to bring in.

If you're a Tampa resident with an unexpected expense and need cash fast, this Advance America location can often process applications on the same day. Bring a valid ID, proof of income, and a bank account to qualify. The company specializes in bridging short-term financial gaps for borrowers across Florida.
address: 2602 E Fletcher Ave Unit 109, Tampa, FL 33612

company_info.headquarters: 2602 E Fletcher Ave Unit 109, Tampa, FL 33612

pros: Same-day loan funding available for payday and installment loans in-store
High loan amounts for title loans ($2,000-$25,000) based on vehicle equity
Multiple application channels: in-store, online, and by phone pre-qualification
Extended operating hours including Saturday morning appointments (9am-4pm)
No specific credit score requirement mentioned—accessible to consumers with poor or limited credit
4.9-star customer rating based on 125,448 reviews indicating consistent service delivery
cons: High-cost debt product: payday and installment loans carry fees and APRs typical of short-term lending, creating debt cycle risk
Limited loan amounts for unsecured products ($100-$1,000 max for installment loans) compared to traditional personal loans
Title loans require vehicle ownership and title possession, exposing borrowers to repossession risk upon default
Short repayment terms on payday loans (2-4 weeks) create urgency and repeat-borrowing pressure
Requires checking account and formal income verification, limiting access for unbanked or gig-economy workers
best_for: Consumers facing immediate cash shortfalls between paychecks with no alternative funding sources
Vehicle owners needing larger emergency funds ($2,000+) who can manage title loan risks
Individuals with poor or no credit history who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans or credit cards
Borrowers in time-sensitive situations who prioritize speed of funding over loan cost
diagnosis: Advance America is best suited for consumers experiencing genuine financial emergencies who have no alternative borrowing options and can repay within the short loan term. The critical caveat is that these are high-cost, short-term products designed only for temporary cash gaps—repeat use indicates a deeper financial problem requiring budgeting intervention or longer-term credit solutions, not repeated payday borrowing.
services: Extended store hours including Saturday availability

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.
